engine: Remotion (compositions/motion/graphics) + FFmpeg (mux/encode). No manual DaVinci timeline; optional final color/loudness pass only.

inputs.motion_clips: Runway RW1-RW5 (budget-capped) or Remotion parallax fallback
inputs.graphics: Remotion tier-K components per remotion_plan G01-G12
inputs.captions: open captions force-aligned to narration master

assembly_order: 1. Lock narration master timing -> derive per-section in/out points.
2. Lay music arc (M1-M6) + ambience beds; duck under VO (-14 LUFS target).
3. Place stills with Ken Burns/2.5D parallax per scene_plan; insert Runway beats RW1-RW5.
4. Render Remotion graphics G01-G12 at the mapped timecodes (THE LINE refrain, Ponzi loop, $65B->$17.5B morph, timeline, cards).
5. Burn citation lower-thirds for every on-screen factual number (linked claim_id) + the cold-open disclaimer.
7. Honor silence beats (before '150 years' and the mechanism reveal).
8. Fit to ~12:00 via small atempo on assembled master if needed (not re-read).
9. Encode with FFmpeg (1080p, H.264 high, +faststart); produce final render + a review proxy.
markers: Chapter markers at each section boundary (hook/opening/actI-IV/ending) for YouTube chapters.
qc_before_first_cut: Every factual number on screen has a citation lower-third (claim_id).
No pink anywhere; no real-person likeness; disclaimer present.
Caption/VO sync within tolerance; loudness ~-14 LUFS, TP <= -1 dB.
Runtime ~12:00; silence beats intact; no slideshow feel (every still has motion).
$65B vs $17.5B stated precisely; 'pleaded guilty' (not 'jury'); SEC = failure not corruption.
gates_ahead: first_cut approval (human gate) on the review proxy
publish approval (human gate) — upload PRIVATE first
